title: MBT55 Hypercycle Output Interface
description: Data structure provided by M3-Core-Engine to PBPE-Finance and HealthBook-AI. All values require IPCC Tier 2 traceability.

soil_n2o_suppression_factor.description: kg N2O suppressed per kg MBT55 per hectare per day

enteric_ch4_reduction_factor.description: kg CH4 reduced per kg MBT55 in feed per day

fermentation_time_to_humus.description: Hours required to reach complete humification

butyrate_yield_in_gut.description: Estimated mmol/L butyrate increase per g MBT Probiotics

ph_stable_range_min.description: Minimum stable pH during MBT55 fermentation

ph_stable_range_max.description: Maximum stable pH during MBT55 fermentation

decomposition_rate.evidence_source: ■MBT55技術解説レポート — 55群構成 (>60% decomposition rate stated)

h2_accumulation_constraint.description: dH2/dt must be approximately zero. Model is BROKEN if this exceeds threshold.
h2_accumulation_constraint.evidence_source: Physics constraint: DeepSeek M1 analysis — H2 consumed to detection limit
